rows.label: qev026902_MSG0001
rows.name:
Your battle with the Growth's super-massive weapon
was supposedly super fierce, jan? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0002
rows.name:
I'm sure some of the wreckage is broken up so badly
that it's completely useless, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0003
rows.name:
There definitely have to be some usable remains left!
So I want you to give it your all and recover them, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh, you're back, jan!
Pretty fast work, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0005
rows.name: Well then, let me check the results right away, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0006
rows.name:
This one is the cockpit block...
This one is the engine...
This is part of the drive system, but what's this one...? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hmm... Hmm, I see...
...
... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0008
rows.name: It seems there were no complaints regarding the results, then. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0009
rows.name:
You're pretty good, aren't you!
If you'd like, why don't you team up with me from now on?
I'll make sure you earn a nice profit. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0010
rows.name: Of course, if you desire, I can provide other services as well... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0011
rows.name: Ah, that's it! I've got it, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0012
rows.name:
Aah! You scared me!
Hey, what's all the commotion about?
I was just getting to the good part... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0013
rows.name:
I just couldn't understand
the meaning of this device, ne. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0014
rows.name:
But when I thought outside of Ma-non common sense,
oh wow, I understood it immediately, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0015
rows.name:
This utilized excess energy from the engine section
to boost the output of a device that is presumably a firearm, no ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0016
rows.name: Hmm, that's an idea that would absolutely never occur to a Ma-non, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0017
rows.name:
Or rather, we Ma-non just aren't interested
in weapons to begin with, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0018
rows.name:
Vehicles that fly through the sky, vehicles that crawl on the ground.
When it comes to those, Ma-non technology is the best in the universe, jan. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0019
rows.name:
But the Growth's technological capabilities for weapons
specialized in destroying things are terrifying, ne... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0020
rows.name:
It's wonderful technology, to be sure, ne,
but when you realize it's converted into offensive power,
it involuntarily sends a chill down my spine, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0021
rows.name: But in reality, we're going to continue having to fight them directly from now on... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0022
rows.name: We can't just sit around being impressed by how amazing it is. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0023
rows.name:
That's certainly true, ne!
I'll analyze this wreckage as quickly as possible on my end
and put effort into weapon enhancement and development, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0024
rows.name: We Ma-non really still don't like weapons, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0025
rows.name:
Beggars can't be choosers, jan!
We just have to do it, jan! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026902_MSG0026
rows.name:
Our technological revolution has only just begun.
Please look forward to Professor Ma-non's next creation, jan! [ST:wait ]
